goal: Rewrite vue-termui from scratch on top of OpenTUI (https://opentui.com/), replacing the old custom renderer + yoga. Progressively strip code out of old/.

tasks.title: Lay down template-lib-ts as the core package at the root
Add playground workspace package with hello world
Install, build core, run playground, run tests
Render hello world via @opentui/core in playground (Node 26.3 + --experimental-ffi)
Build the Vue custom renderer on top of @opentui/core (map nodeOps -> Renderables, reuse old createApp/nodeOps pattern)
Progressively port components/composables from old/ (no CLI planned)
